nhl.headline: Stanley Cup odds: Hurricanes favored repeat as Cup champs, Avalanche second for 2027

nhl.headline: Hurricanes favored to repeat, followed by Avs, Golden Knights
nhl.summary: The Hurricanes are a leading +700 to win the Stanley Cup for the 2026-27 season, followed by the Avalanche (+800) and Golden Knights (+850). The Oilers (11-1), Panthers (11-1) and Lightning (12-1) make up the next tier of contenders.

wnba.headline: Kelsey Plum scores a career-high 43 points in the Sparks' OT win over the Mercury
wnba.summary: — Kelsey Plum scored a career-high 43 points, offsetting Kahleah Copper's career-best 41-point effort and the Los Angeles Sparks beat the Phoenix Mercury 111-102 in overtime Saturday night to improve to 3-2 in Commissioner's Cup play.

ncaab.headline: Highlight: Ole Miss falls short in high-scoring battle against Troy in MCWS
ncaab.summary: Will Furniss, Brayden Randle and Collin Reuter each drill home runs while Hunter Elliot tosses nine Ks as the Rebels conclude their season with a 12-8 loss to the Trojans.

tennis.headline: French Open: How Alexander Zverev finally won a major title

tennis.headline: Alexander Zverev wins French Open, finally claims 1st Grand Slam title
tennis.summary: Alexander Zverev beat Flavio Cobolli 6-1, 4-6, 6-4, 6-7 (5), 6-1 to win the French Open title.

f1.headline: Nico Hülkenberg 'unlucky,' retired because gravel hit safety kill switch
f1.summary: A piece of gravel forced Nico Hülkenberg into a retirement from the Barcelona-Catalunya Grand Prix after it was flicked up by the car in front and hit the safety kill switch on the side his Audi.

f1.headline: Lando Norris: Ferrari making engine improvements will 'embarrass' rivals
f1.summary: Lando Norris has feared Ferrari would start embarrassing the rest of the Formula 1 grid if the Italian team made big engine gains this season.

f1.headline: Lewis Hamilton praises fans for 'rescuing' him from 'dark place' after Ferrari woes
f1.summary: Lewis Hamilton has credited his fans with rescuing him from a "dark place" during his first season with Ferrari and revealed he was struggling with an injury for much of last year.

f1.headline: Mercedes boss Toto Wolff on Lewis Hamilton title threat: 'If he smells blood, he goes'
f1.summary: Mercedes team principal Toto Wolff has said Lewis Hamilton is a genuine threat for this year's title, saying of his former driver, "I know what he's capable of."

f1.headline: Hamilton has found joy -- and success -- again with Ferrari
f1.summary: Is the seven-time world champion back in peak form? It might be too soon to tell, but don't count him out, either.

f1.headline: Lando Norris on Lewis Hamilton Spain win: 'He can stick his middle finger up' to the haters
f1.summary: Lewis Hamilton has not only made fans across the world delighted with his first win for Ferrari, but his compatriots Lando Norris and George Russell are also in awe of the seven-time champion.

football.headline: Source: Jets, guard Joe Tippmann reach 4-year, $62M extension
football.summary: The Jets and right guard Joe Tippmann have agreed to a four-year, $62 million contract extension that includes $31 million in new guarantees, sources told ESPN on Monday.
